name: STM32F098 UFBGA100
description: Generated from the STM32F098 alternate-function workbook and STM32F098CC datasheet for STM32F098 UFBGA100. This definition models the UFBGA100 package with per-signal routing synthesized from Sheet1 package pins and Sheet2 AF0-AF15 matrix data. STM32F098 devices combine the widest STM32F0 package set with the most expansive alternate-function routing in the series. This package definition exposes 30 peripheral blocks covering 7 timers, 8 serial ports, 2 SPI controllers, 2 I2S interfaces, 2 I2C controllers, 1 ADC instance, and 2 ultra-low-power comparators.

peripherals.label: ADC1
peripherals.description: Analog-to-digital converter with 16 analog input channels.

peripherals.label: CEC
peripherals.description: HDMI-CEC single-wire interface.

peripherals.label: COMP1
peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input and a comparator output.

peripherals.description: On-chip analog comparator with a positive input and a comparator output.
